action.reasoning: Observation: LGB with early-stop (at 59 trees) reached ic_mean=0.0300 (slight gain from 0.0281 baseline); valid MSE plateaus immediately (~0.000722), train time ~102s per iter. Analysis: MSE on noisy next-day returns is poor proxy for IC; early-stop prevents learning useful patterns, under-utilizes 2021 data. Decision: retrain on full 2008-2021 without early-stop (fixed 1000 rounds), lower LR=0.02 + regularization (L1/L2, min_data_in_leaf) for better generalization on tabular Alpha158; keep predict.py unchanged and submit_eval to track IC improvement.
